category_sources: source_facts.description says SNG enables lossless editing of PNGs; official SNG page describes PNG textual representation.
display_name_sources: Official SNG resource page uses SNG as the project name and says the code is usually packaged as sng.
docs_sources: Official SNG resource page lists sng.html as Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SNG page provides a SourceForge download/source tarball but no official source-control repository URL.
tags_sources: Official SNG documentation describes a compiler/decompiler translating between PNG and editable SNG text format.
